news-global-econ.title: Peter Schweizer: Investigate Iran War Insider Trading
news-global-econ.description:
Are there administration insiders profiting from knowing news about the war with Iran before the public does? Recent news stories from the world of “prediction markets” seem to indicate that may in fact be happening.
The post Peter Schweizer: Investigate Iran…

news-global-econ.title: Kevin O'Leary says removing Iran from Strait of Hormuz would be a global 'game changer'
news-global-econ.description: 'Shark Tank' star Kevin O'Leary says removing Iranian control of the Strait of Hormuz would be a global game changer, calling the shift 'very bullish' for world markets.

news-global-econ.title: Trump boosts GOP war chest as House Republicans gear up for high-stakes midterm fight
news-global-econ.description: House Republicans will announce a record haul at the NRCC fundraising dinner headlined by Trump as they fight to defend their slim House majority.

news-global-econ.title: US Army raises enlistment age to 42 and eases marijuana policies to bolster ranks
news-global-econ.description: The U.S. Army is raising its maximum recruitment age to 42 and removing restrictions for single marijuana convictions to boost technical talent.

news-global-econ.title: Meet Iran's hardline speaker who threatened to burn US forces — reportedly Tehran's point man for talks
news-global-econ.description: Iranian parliament speaker Ghalibaf has threatened U.S. forces while reportedly being eyed by the Trump administration as a potential Iran talks channel.

news-global-soc.description: First Lady Melania Trump on Wednesday hosted a global tech summit at the White House East Room, featuring the Figure 03 humanoid robot.

news-global-soc.title: Iranian missiles could have hit DC from Venezuela before Trump move, Burgum warns
news-global-soc.description: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum revealed that Iran could have hit Washington, D.C., and other U.S. cities through proxies in Venezuela had the Trump administration not intervened.
